text: The luxury tax line for this season is just over $200M total salary. Teams pay an additional $1.50 in luxury tax payments per additional dollar of team salary over that line. This is why shedding Aaron Wiggins's ~$9M salary can end up saving Clay Bennett almost $60M total.
